concept: I want a game where I play as a living constellation that rearranges its stars to form different mythological figures with unique abilities. As a scorpion, I can navigate dangerous terrain; as an archer, I can target distant objects; as a water-bearer, I can influence tides and currents. Other celestial entities compete for prominence in the night sky, and I must outshine them through strategic positioning and timely transformations. Ancient civilizations on Earth observe my celestial displays and build temples that channel power back to me when properly aligned with my position.
